import React from 'react'; const leaderProfiles = [ { name: 'Mayank Doultani', role: 'CEO & Co-Founder', desc: 'Driving the vision for Hudson, Mayank combines deep IT consultancy with strategic manpower leadership. His focus is on pioneering industry-specific tech and sourcing.', icon: '👤' }, { name: 'Vikas Singh', role: 'Technical Director', desc: 'Overseeing all software architecture and delivery, Vikas ensures that IT solutions integrate flawlessly with sector requirements. Expert in scalable systems.', icon: '⚙️' }, ]; const Electronics = () => { return (
{/* 1. HEADER SECTION (Condensed) */}

Electrical Solutions

Expert staffing for power grids, industrial wiring, and renewable energy projects.

{/* 2. CAREER BANNER (Minimal & Impactful) */}

Start Your Career With Us

Join our global team and work on industry-leading electronics projects.

{/* 3. PROFILES SECTION (Grid Style to save space) */}
{leaderProfiles.map((leader, index) => (
{leader.icon}

{leader.name}

{leader.role}

"{leader.desc}"

))}
); }; export default Electronics;
